gmd:title.gco:CharacterString: National Coral Reef Monitoring Program: Assessment of coral reef benthic communities in Flower Garden Banks National Marine Sanctuary
NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

gmd:organisationName.gmx:Anchor: NOAA National Centers for Coastal Ocean Science (NCCOS)

gmd:name.gco:CharacterString: NOAA National Centers for Coastal Ocean Science (NCCOS) website

gmd:abstract.gco:CharacterString:
Data provided in this collection were gathered within the FGBNMS as part of NOAA National Centers for Coastal Ocean Science (NCCOS)-led missions in collaboration with partners at NOAA National Ocean Service (NOS) Office of National Marine Sanctuaries FGBNMS, NOAA National Marine Fisheries Service (NMFS) Southeast Fisheries Science Center and Texas A&M.
This benthic data collection for the ongoing National Coral Reef Monitoring Program (NCRMP) consists of two survey types: the Line Point-Intercept (LPI) method and the Coral Demographic method. The LPI method provides a measure of percent cover of biotic and abiotic components of the benthos in a stratified random sampling design in hardbottom and coral reef habitats. LPI surveys are concurrent with and along the same transect as fish surveys. The coral demographics protocol provides more detailed and species-specific insight (‘signal magnitude’) for coral populations than is provided by percent cover.

gmd:purpose.gco:CharacterString: The National Coral Reef Monitoring Program (NCRMP) details a long-term approach to provide an ecosystem perspective via monitoring climate, fish, benthic, and socioeconomic variables in a consistent and integrated manner. The NCRMP is intended to coordinate various Coral Reef Conservation Coral Reef Program (CRCP) biological, physical, and human dimensions activities into a cohesive NOAA-wide effort. Through the implementation of the NCRMP, NOAA will be able to clearly and concisely communicate results of national-scale monitoring to national, state, and territorial policy makers, resource managers, and the public on a periodic basis.

gmd:organisationName.gmx:Anchor: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

gmd:otherConstraints.gco:CharacterString: Cite as: NOAA National Centers for Coastal Ocean Science; NOAA Southeast Fisheries Science Center (2016). National Coral Reef Monitoring Program: Assessment of coral reef benthic communities in Flower Garden Banks National Marine Sanctuary. [indicate subset used]. NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information. Dataset. https://doi.org/10.7289/v5vd6wts. Accessed [date].

gmd:useLimitation.gco:CharacterString: Distribution liability: NOAA and NCEI make no warranty, expressed or implied, regarding these data, nor does the fact of distribution constitute such a warranty. NOAA and NCEI cannot assume liability for any damages caused by any errors or omissions in these data. If appropriate, NCEI can only certify that the data it distributes are an authentic copy of the records that were accepted for inclusion in the NCEI archives.

gmd:otherConstraints.gco:CharacterString: Use liability: NOAA and NCEI cannot provide any warranty as to the accuracy, reliability, or completeness of furnished data. Users assume responsibility to determine the usability of these data. The user is responsible for the results of any application of this data for other than its intended purpose.

gmd:otherConstraints.gmx:Anchor: Some of the data in this dataset has been dedicated to the public domain under a Creative Commons CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication.
SPDX License: Creative Commons Zero v1.0 Universal (CC0-1.0)

gmd:title.gco:CharacterString: OBIS USA: NCRMP Benthic Variables in Darwin Core Format

gmd:name.gco:CharacterString: OBIS USA: NCRMP Benthic Variables in Darwin Core Format

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Hard coral species percent cover and species abundance data are available in Darwin Core format for Atlantic/Caribbean sampling sites through OBIS USA.

gmd:supplementalInformation.gco:CharacterString:
Accessions that are part of the current collection: 0208241, 0224589, 0277838, 0302943.
Accession 0151818 was originally part of this collection and may have been cited using the collection DOI; the data in this accession was superseded by accession 0224589 which represents the latest version of the data.

gmd:organisationName.gmx:Anchor: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

gmd:fees.gco:CharacterString: In most cases, electronic downloads of the data are free. However, fees may apply for custom orders, data certifications, copies of analog materials, and data distribution on physical media.

gmd:orderingInstructions.gco:CharacterString: Contact NCEI for other distribution options and instructions.

gmd:description.gco:CharacterString: Navigate directly to the URL for a descriptive web page with download links.
Search for data granules belonging to this collection (a granule is the smallest aggregation of data that can be independently described and retrieved).
NCEI Accession 0208241 was revised and v2.2 was published.
NCEI Accession 0208241 was revised and v3.3 was published.
NCEI Accession 0277838 was revised and v2.2 was published.

gmd:maintenanceNote.gco:CharacterString: Metadata are developed, maintained and distributed by NCEI. Updates are performed as needed to maintain currentness.

gmd:organisationName.gco:CharacterString: NOAA National Centers for Environmental Information

gmi:description.gco:CharacterString: not an instrument - use as observation type
not an instrument - maybe an observation type

Updated information from ICES for the vessel Fling from UNITED STATES(US). Proposed Code : 336N Name : Fling Country(s) : UNITED STATES(US) (ISO Country Code) Platform Class : 36 Fishing vessel Call Sign : WDA7435 MMSI: 366843280 Title : MV Current Length : 30.5 Notes : The M/V Fling is a 100 foot, 34 passenger dive vessel operating out of Freeport, Texas. She runs regularly scheduled multi-day trips to the Flower Gardens and Stetson Banks National Marine Sanctuary. Sister vessel to the M/V Spree.
Information Sources: - http://flingcharters.com/ - http://wireless2.fcc.gov/UlsApp/UlsSearch/license.jsp?licKey=2392227
Confirmed by NOAA on 2015-09-28. Submitted to ICES on 2015-08-05.
